faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I receive the content?
faq.a1: After your payment, you receive a PDF by email containing the invitation link to the private Telegram channel. Make sure to enter your email address correctly when placing your order.
faq.a2: Yes, totally. We use Telegram because it doesn't share any personal information. You can even use a nickname when filling in your payment details. We're not looking to know you, just to deliver the content.
faq.q3: How long do I have access to the channel?
faq.a3: Once you join the Telegram channel, you have permanent access. The content remains available as long as the channel is active.
faq.q4: I'm on iPhone, is it compatible?
faq.a4: Yes! If you're using an iPhone, use the Safari browser app to connect to your Telegram account and access the channel.
